scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c cyan,yellow,green "pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/api dev" "pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/worker dev" "pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/shared build && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/ui build && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/api build && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/worker build && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/shared build && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/ui build && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/web typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/shared lint && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/ui lint && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/api lint && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/worker lint && pnpm --filter @shippy-ops-ai/web lint
